summary: Comprehensive testing completed for social media integration feature. All new social media functionality working correctly including backend APIs, frontend components, and admin panel integration. Backend: 100% success rate (51/51 tests). Frontend: Social Feed section displays correctly with Facebook/Instagram/custom embeds. Admin panel 'Redes Sociales' section fully functional with tabs, configuration options, and save functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Name input field selector needs adjustment - email and message fields work correctly

passed_tests: Backend API: All 51/51 tests passed (100% success rate)
GET /api/settings returns new social media fields (facebook_embed_enabled, facebook_page_url, instagram_embed_code, custom_embed_code)
PUT /api/settings correctly saves and updates social media configuration
Homepage Social Feed section loads and displays correctly
Facebook Page Plugin embed displays when enabled with proper links
Instagram embed displays when configured with test embed code
Custom embed displays when configured (Feed Social Completo)
Admin panel 'Redes Sociales' menu item appears in sidebar
SocialMediaManager component loads with proper title and status indicators
Facebook tab shows configuration panel with toggle and URL input
Instagram tab shows Elfsight/Curator options and embed code textarea
Feed Completo tab shows service recommendations and custom embed textarea
All service recommendation links (Elfsight, Curator, POWR, Juicer) present and functional
Save social settings button present and functional
Authentication system still works (login/logout with admin@racingsangabriel.es)
Admin dashboard loads correctly with updated statistics
All existing admin functionality (news, teams, matches, gallery, contacts, settings) still works
Frontend-backend integration working perfectly for social media settings

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (social media integration working perfectly, minor contact form selector issue)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (social media settings sync between admin and homepage working perfectly)
